title: Tonsil symptoms in child

presenting_history.text: Supports documenting sleep symptoms and selected comorbidity context in children without diagnosing obstructive sleep apnoea or ordering polysomnography.
presenting_history.rationale: Supports sleep-disordered breathing and comorbidity context for tonsil symptoms in a child; no decision is generated.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Supports documenting sleep symptoms and selected comorbidity context in children without diagnosing obstructive sleep apnoea or ordering polysomnography.

investigations.text: Supports documenting recurrent clinically significant throat infections, episode-associated fever, cervical nodes, exudate or testing, functional impact, and modifying factors without applying an automatic surgery threshold.
investigations.rationale: Supports recurrent throat-infection episode and modifying-factor documentation for tonsil symptoms in a child; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting recurrent clinically significant throat infections, episode-associated fever, cervical nodes, exudate or testing, functional impact, and modifying factors without applying an automatic surgery threshold.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, symptom onset, episode count, fever, exudate, testing, antibiotics, sleep symptoms, examination, diagnosis and clinician plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for tonsil symptoms in a child.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
